stories.name: flutter-installation
stories.title: Install Flutter SDK alongside Dart
stories.description: Extend the existing dart roles (dart-alpine, dart-ubuntu) to install the Flutter SDK after the Dart SDK. Add Flutter download metadata to downloads.yml. Update the wizard label to reflect Flutter is included.

includes: downloads.yml: add flutter section with ARM64 Linux download URLs for versions 3.7, 3.6, 3.5
dart/tasks/main.yml: add Flutter installation tasks (same as alpine)
constants.py: update dart label to 'Dart + Flutter (dart, flutter, pub)'
tests: update test for dart label, verify flutter path in profile.d
excludes: config.py changes (no new config field needed - Flutter is always bundled)
provisioner.py changes (dart role already included when dart selected)

stories.notes: Flutter is always installed with Dart — no opt-out. The dart role is the single point of change for installation. The provisioner passes dart_version which the role uses to look up the corresponding flutter download.
